Ticket.Subject: Cannot log in to my account
Ticket.Description: I have been unable to log in since yesterday morning using my usual credentials.

Ticket.Subject: Password reset link does not work
Ticket.Description: The password reset email arrives but clicking the link opens an error page every time.

Ticket.Subject: App crashes on startup after update
Ticket.Description: The mobile application crashes immediately on launch following the latest version update.

Ticket.Subject: API returns 500 errors intermittently
Ticket.Description: Our integration receives HTTP 500 responses roughly every ten requests during peak hours.

Ticket.Subject: Dashboard widgets not loading
Ticket.Description: Three of the five dashboard widgets show an infinite spinner and never display any data.

Ticket.Subject: Export to CSV produces empty file
Ticket.Description: Clicking the export button downloads a CSV file that contains only the header row with no data.

Ticket.Subject: Duplicate charge on my invoice
Ticket.Description: I have been billed twice for the same subscription period and need an urgent refund.

Ticket.Subject: Invoice shows wrong currency
Ticket.Description: My invoices are displayed in USD even though my account region is configured to use EUR.

Ticket.Subject: Refund not received after two weeks
Ticket.Description: I requested a refund fourteen days ago and have not yet seen the credit on my bank statement.

Ticket.Subject: Subscription auto-renewed after cancellation
Ticket.Description: My annual subscription renewed automatically even though I cancelled it three weeks before renewal.

Ticket.Subject: VAT number missing from invoices
Ticket.Description: My registered business VAT number does not appear on any of the invoices generated for my account.

Ticket.Subject: Promo code not applying discount
Ticket.Description: I entered a valid promotional code during checkout but the total was not reduced as expected.

Ticket.Subject: Please add dark mode to the interface
Ticket.Description: A dark mode toggle would significantly reduce eye strain for users who work in low-light environments.

Ticket.Subject: Bulk CSV import from admin panel
Ticket.Description: We need to import up to ten thousand records directly from the admin panel without using the API.

Ticket.Subject: Mobile push notification support
Ticket.Description: Please add push notification support to both the iOS and Android mobile applications.

Ticket.Subject: Custom report builder with drag and drop
Ticket.Description: We need a drag-and-drop report builder so agents can create ad-hoc reports without developer assistance.

Ticket.Subject: Role-based access control per module
Ticket.Description: Administrators need granular per-module permissions rather than the current all-or-nothing role system.

Ticket.Subject: Submit button on ticket form causes 400
Ticket.Description: The submit button on the new ticket creation form consistently returns HTTP 400 with no descriptive error.

Ticket.Subject: Filter dropdown resets on page refresh
Ticket.Description: Applying a category filter and then refreshing the page clears the selected filter every time.

Ticket.Subject: Sort by date broken after row 100
Ticket.Description: Sorting tickets by creation date works for the first hundred rows but ordering breaks beyond that.

Ticket.Subject: Delete confirmation modal not closing
Ticket.Description: After deleting a ticket the confirmation modal stays open and requires a full page reload to dismiss.

Ticket.Subject: CSV export includes deleted tickets
Ticket.Description: Exported CSV files contain tickets that were permanently deleted over a month ago from the system.

Ticket.Subject: Error 503 on bulk import for large files
Ticket.Description: The import endpoint returns 503 Service Unavailable whenever the uploaded file exceeds one megabyte.

Ticket.Subject: Date picker accepts invalid dates
Ticket.Description: The date picker control allows selecting 31 February without displaying any validation error message.

Ticket.Subject: General question about SLA policy
Ticket.Description: I would like to understand the committed response times for different ticket priority levels under my plan.

Ticket.Subject: Requesting a product demo for our team
Ticket.Description: Our team of twenty agents would like to schedule a product demonstration before committing to a plan.

Ticket.Subject: Documentation link returns 404
Ticket.Description: The link to the API documentation page in the application footer consistently returns a 404 error.

Ticket.Subject: Question about data residency region
Ticket.Description: Can you confirm which geographic region our customer data is stored in under the current subscription plan?

Ticket.Subject: Accessibility: screen reader labels missing
Ticket.Description: Several interactive buttons and form inputs across the application lack the correct labels for screen reader users.

Ticket.Subject: Data export required for GDPR compliance
Ticket.Description: We require a full data export for GDPR subject access request compliance within the statutory thirty-day period.
